summary:
EXP-275 addresses ISS-1672 (SEC-4.2.2 c3 H2 — predictions.html Tier 1 coherence rule unacknowledged). Single new paragraph inserted between §4.2.2 paragraph 5 and paragraph 6, acknowledging the dome's separate Tier 1 falsification criterion ("No coherent signal at ≥3 stations with r > 0.5 on verified Kp<2 day") and closing the defender retreat to it: globe still treated as null pattern in same document; BOU 2017 -10.9 nT already exhibited Chapman-pattern coherence with the 2017 eclipse contact times — the very signature the rule asks the 2026 measurement to lack; BOU-2017 trilemma holds under either published rule. Patch_strategy: full_section_replacement (clean diff is one new

; rest byte-identical). Word count delta +105. Verdict (Refuted by Data) unchanged. Decider: integrate, run tests/run.sh, then close ISS-1672 with reference to EXP-275.
